title: cleome integrifolia
intro: Cleome integrifolia, also known as the beeplant or Mexican bee plant, is a flowering plant native to Mexico and Central America. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antifungal properties. The health benefits of Cleome integrifolia include its ability to soothe skin irritations, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma. Cleome integrifolia can be prepared as a herbal tea, infusion, or tincture, and is also used in salves and creams to treat skin conditions and wounds.
